text: Moving from a waiting area filled with silent anticipation into a vibrant exhibit space, I feel an odd mingling of patience and intellectual curiosity. The first space invites reflection on human interaction and routine, while the second scene awakens my wonder with its celebration of research and innovation. I am reminded of humanity's restless quest for understanding and the mystery of our coexistence with technology. Here, each moment seems suspended between the familiar and the unknown, inviting me to contemplate my place in the world.
